rung: G2 CONFIRMATORY READ — the single sanctioned test-slab evaluation ([U-04] five-condition machinery + [U-06] v2 amendments; mechanical, no interpretation)
sanctioned_touch: K1: the test mask is touched exactly twice ever — G2 close (THIS read) and G3

inference.taper_of_record: hann (micro-cycle A1, irreversible); uniform demoted to diagnostic co-report
inference.windows: periodic stride-32, 216 windows, COLA accumulated-weight assert <1e-6 (S7)

seam_diagnostic.interior_definition: (coord mod 32) in [8,24) on all axes — >=8 from every face of every covering window
seam_diagnostic.a2_rule: a tapered read flagging >0.02 REOPENS the seam issue (micro-cycle A2)

uniform_co_report.note: diagnostic co-report only; hann column governs (A1, irreversible)

taper_modulation_check.note: PROBE column (micro-cycle): detection channel for possible k~2pi/32vox modulation from periodic Hann weights; descriptive, no pre-registered threshold

descriptive.standing_disclosure: posterior-mean variance compression rides every recovery quote (PI ruling 3)

distance_to_train_stratification.rule: 29 test planes sorted by loader distance_to_train_region (periodic), grouped 8/7/7/7 near->far is by sort order (mechanical read-time ruling, disclosed)

u_g_S4.rule: z1-z3 only (z4 reclassified 3ccf6a2): any >= 0.5 x actual OR > sealed test null97.5

z3_derangement.rule: global derangement of whole-ray flux profiles across the primary pattern, geometry fixed, no self-maps

delta_phys_z4.scope_rule: while Delta_phys ~ 0 (within SE) every recovery claim is scoped 'suite-common (shared-IC) structure recovered from flux' (3ccf6a2; G3's question)

z5_untrained_swap.rule: R2 rider (50de53a): untrained-physics swap column — diagnostic, NOT a trigger; P3 flux into the P1 eval pattern

sealed_truth_spectrum_band.status: SEALED test-mask band (K1); provenance of the banked 0.22108

prediction_matched_band.seeds: default_rng([20260728, i]) i=0..199 — seed family shared with the s3 pred-null per the pinned S3 protocol (different cube)

g2_pairs.machinery: [D-75] §7 B-ii five conditions; pairs ordered both directions; real frame primary; t_crit(df=7)=2.365; n_boot=1000; operative bars from r9_heldout_bars.json

U0.condition: G1 fails / scoring-path acceptance fails / artifact-identity mismatch

U-A.condition: unet>grid AND unet>wiener_L3 AND unet>mlp all fire (sigma=2, five conditions)

U-A'.condition: unet>grid fires but unet>wiener_L3 or unet>mlp does not (transitivity anomaly -> fail-closed audit)

U-B.condition: unet>mlp + unet>wiener_L3 fire; tie with grid (neither unet>grid nor grid>unet fires)

U-D.condition: unet>mlp does not fire, or mlp>unet fires

U-E.condition: unet>grid does not fire at sigma=2 but fires at sigma=4 (mechanical extension, see deviations)

U-F.condition: condition-5 frame sign reversal is the sole failure on a primary-direction pair

U-G.condition: S4 over z1-z3: any control r_s2 >= 0.5 x actual (0.46843) OR > sealed test null97.5 (0.22108341828682537)

U-H.condition: held-out-physics drop > 0.05 — NOT EVALUABLE on this read (no held-out-physics-trained model exists; G3 scope)

deviations: random-pattern column (v2 P3): size pinned = primary size 1024, drawn without replacement from all 16384 file sightlines, default_rng(20260730).choice, sorted ascending; the spec pinned only the seed — size/pool are read-time mechanical rulings, disclosed here
distance-to-train stratification binning (4 distance-sorted plane groups 8/7/7/7) is a read-time mechanical ruling; the [U-04] mandatory column pinned the variable, not the binning

pair tests at sigma=1 and sigma=4 are the mechanical extension needed solely to evaluate cell U-E (win only at sigma=4); the five-condition machinery of record is defined at sigma=2 (primary metric); condition-1 threshold 0.10 applied unchanged at the other sigmas

condition-3 block bootstrap: [U-04]-disclosed held-out-geometry adaptation — 64 full-thickness transverse column blocks (29x24x24) tiling the test slab, paired resample, n_boot=1000, seed 20260723 (d75 convention); replaces the full-box 8^3 NC.block_bootstrap_delta_rs geometry

condition-2 baselines use the BANKED R9 per-block values (r9_heldout_bars.json block_r) against freshly computed unet per-block values on the SAME 8 blocks ([163,191) trim, banked R9 deviation reused)
z3 derangement (seed 20260729) and z4/z5 swaps operate on the primary [0,1024) pattern only, matching the banked s3/VAL-read construction
MPS float32 forward passes are not bit-reproducible; all quoted numbers are from this single read of the pinned checkpoint
